subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that thou hast traversed the vast expanse of eloquence and ascended unto the heavens of rhetoric [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خدا را که صحرای بافضای فصاحترا طی فرموده اید و ارتقی بسموات بلاغت
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @mystical themes, @self-description of God; God's self-remembrance, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @free will and predestination; fate, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
